ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equation_types" (
  "equation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equation type */,
  "equation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equation type */,
  "valid_coefficients" TEXT /* JSON string containing valid ranges or constraints for coefficients of the equation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "equation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equation type this test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test case */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_equation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equation_type_id") REFERENCES equation_types ("equation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this input belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input (e.g., a, b, c) */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Value of the input */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of the input (e.g., coefficient, constant) */,
  "input_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the input (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_inputs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected output */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output (e.g., roots, solutions) */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Value of the output */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of the output (e.g., roots, solutions) */,
  "output_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the output (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_outputs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this execution belongs to */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of the execution */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values used for the execution */,
  "actual_output" TEXT /* Actual output of the execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the execution in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_executions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, test_case_creator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission belongs to */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_permissions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equation_coefficients" (
  "coefficient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coefficient */,
  "equation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equation type this coefficient belongs to */,
  "coefficient_name" TEXT /* Name of the coefficient (e.g., a, b, c) */,
  "coefficient_value" REAL /* Value of the coefficient */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of the coefficient (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "input_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the coefficient (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coefficient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equation_coefficients_equation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equation_type_id") REFERENCES equation_types ("equation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equation_constants" (
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant */,
  "equation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equation type this constant belongs to */,
  "constant_name" TEXT /* Name of the constant (e.g., d) */,
  "constant_value" REAL /* Value of the constant */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of the constant (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "input_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the constant (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equation_constants_equation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equation_type_id") REFERENCES equation_types ("equation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case this validation rule belongs to */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., a > 0, b < 0) */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., range, format) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Custom error message to display if the validation fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_validations_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_execution_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution this error belongs to */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., input validation, execution failure) */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_errors_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_case_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
